reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate EDF Kraken
reauth_confirm.description: EDF authentication has expired. Enter your EDF credentials again.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to EDF Kraken.

abort.already_configured: This EDF account is already configured.

auth_failed.title: EDF authentication failed
auth_failed.description: EDF Kraken could not authenticate account {account_number}. Reauthenticate the integration from the integration settings.

rate_limited.title: EDF API rate limit reached
rate_limited.description: EDF Kraken could not update account {account_number} because EDF reported a rate limit, point allowance, or query complexity issue. The integration will retry on the next scheduled update.

no_meters.title: No EDF meter readings found
no_meters.description: EDF Kraken connected to account {account_number}, but no cumulative electricity or gas meter readings were found. Confirm the account has active supply points and check diagnostics for the discovered account shape.

daily_usage_unavailable.title: EDF daily usage unavailable
daily_usage_unavailable.description: Daily usage sensors are enabled for account {account_number}, but EDF returned no grouped consumption data. This can happen when smart consumption is unavailable or the EDF GraphQL field is protected for the account.

metadata_unavailable.title: EDF account metadata unavailable
metadata_unavailable.description: Account metadata sensors are enabled for account {account_number}, but EDF returned no tariff or balance metadata. This can happen when the EDF GraphQL fields are unavailable for the account.
